  #region Enums
  public enum PlayerRole {
    [pbr::OriginalName("FAST")] Fast = 0,
    [pbr::OriginalName("AUTO")] Auto = 1,
    [pbr::OriginalName("BLOCK")] Block = 2,
    [pbr::OriginalName("STRIKE")] Strike = 3,

    /// </summary>

            break;
          }
          case 26: {
            Content = input.ReadString();
            break;
          }
          case 34: {
            BotId = input.ReadString();
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #endif

  }

    private object event_;
    /// <summary>Enum of possible cases for the "event" oneof.</summary>
    public enum EventOneofCase {
      None = 0,
      RoomInfo = 1,
      RoomEvent = 2,
      GameStateEvent = 3,
      TimerEvent = 4,
      GameEvent = 5,
    }
    private EventOneofCase eventCase_ = EventOneofCase.None;
    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]

    public EventOneofCase EventCase {
      get { return eventCase_; }
    }

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
    public void ClearEvent() {
      eventCase_ = EventOneofCase.None;
      event_ = null;
    }

    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
    public override bool Equals(object other) {

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]

        return false;
      }
      if (ReferenceEquals(other, this)) {
        return true;

      if (!object.Equals(RoomInfo, other.RoomInfo)) return false;
      if (!object.Equals(RoomEvent, other.RoomEvent)) return false;
      if (!object.Equals(GameStateEvent, other.GameStateEvent)) return false;
      if (!object.Equals(TimerEvent, other.TimerEvent)) return false;
      if (!object.Equals(GameEvent, other.GameEvent)) return false;
      if (EventCase != other.EventCase) return false;
      return Equals(_unknownFields, other._unknownFields);
    }

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]

      if (_unknownFields != null) {

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]

    #else
      if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.RoomInfo) {
        output.WriteRawTag(10);
        output.WriteMessage(RoomInfo);
      }
      if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.RoomEvent) {
        output.WriteRawTag(18);
        output.WriteMessage(RoomEvent);
      }
      if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.GameStateEvent) {
        output.WriteRawTag(26);
        output.WriteMessage(GameStateEvent);
      }
      if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.TimerEvent) {
        output.WriteRawTag(34);
        output.WriteMessage(TimerEvent);
      }
      if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.GameEvent) {
        output.WriteRawTag(42);
        output.WriteMessage(GameEvent);
      }
      if (_unknownFields != null) {
        _unknownFields.WriteTo(output);
      }
    #endif
    }

    public void MergeFrom(StreamEvent other) {
      if (other == null) {
        return;

      switch (other.EventCase) {
        case EventOneofCase.RoomInfo:
          if (RoomInfo == null) {
            RoomInfo = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.RoomInfo();

          RoomInfo.MergeFrom(other.RoomInfo);
          break;

          break;

          break;

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
    public void MergeFrom(RoomEvent other) {
      if (other == null) {
        return;
      }
      switch (other.EventCase) {
        case EventOneofCase.PlayerUpdate:
          if (PlayerUpdate == null) {
            PlayerUpdate = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.RoomPlayerUpdate();
          }
          PlayerUpdate.MergeFrom(other.PlayerUpdate);
          break;
        case EventOneofCase.RoleSet:
          if (RoleSet == null) {
            RoleSet = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerRoleSet();
          }
          RoleSet.MergeFrom(other.RoleSet);
          break;
        case EventOneofCase.SkillSelected:
          if (SkillSelected == null) {
            SkillSelected = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerSkillSelected();
          }
          SkillSelected.MergeFrom(other.SkillSelected);
          break;
      }

      _unknownFields = pb::UnknownFieldSet.MergeFrom(_unknownFields, other._unknownFields);
    }

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
    public void MergeFrom(pb::CodedInputStream input) {
    #if !GOOGLE_PROTOBUF_REFSTRUCT_COMPATIBILITY_MODE

    #else
      uint tag;
      while ((tag = input.ReadTag()) != 0) {
      if ((tag & 7) == 4) {
        // Abort on any end group tag.
        return;
      }
      switch(tag) {
          default:
            _unknownFields = pb::UnknownFieldSet.MergeFieldFrom(_unknownFields, input);
            break;
          case 10: {
            global::SuperAnkars.Connections.RoomPlayerUpdate subBuilder = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.RoomPlayerUpdate();
            if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.PlayerUpdate) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(PlayerUpdate);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            PlayerUpdate = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
          case 18: {
            global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerRoleSet subBuilder = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerRoleSet();
            if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.RoleSet) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(RoleSet);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            RoleSet = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
          case 26: {
            global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerSkillSelected subBuilder = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerSkillSelected();
            if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.SkillSelected) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(SkillSelected);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            SkillSelected = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    #endif
    }

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]

      if (other == null) {
        return;

      GameStarted = 1,
      GameEnded = 2,

      if (other == null) {
        return;
      }
      switch (other.EventCase) {
        case EventOneofCase.GameStarted:
          if (GameStarted == null) {
            GameStarted = new global::Google.Protobuf.WellKnownTypes.Empty();
          }
          GameStarted.MergeFrom(other.GameStarted);
          break;

          if (GameEnded == null) {
            GameEnded = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.GameResult();

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]

    #if !GOOGLE_PROTOBUF_REFSTRUCT_COMPATIBILITY_MODE
      input.ReadRawMessage(this);
    #else
      uint tag;
      while ((tag = input.ReadTag()) != 0) {
      if ((tag & 7) == 4) {
        // Abort on any end group tag.
        return;
      }
      switch(tag) {
          default:
            _unknownFields = pb::UnknownFieldSet.MergeFieldFrom(_unknownFields, input);
            break;
          case 10: {
            global::Google.Protobuf.WellKnownTypes.Empty subBuilder = new global::Google.Protobuf.WellKnownTypes.Empty();
            if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.GameStarted) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(GameStarted);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            GameStarted = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
          case 18: {
            global::SuperAnkars.Connections.GameResult subBuilder = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.GameResult();
            if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.GameEnded) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(GameEnded);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            GameEnded = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    #endif
    }

    #if !GOOGLE_PROTOBUF_REFSTRUCT_COMPATIBILITY_MODE
    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]

      uint tag;
      while ((tag = input.ReadTag()) != 0) {
      if ((tag & 7) == 4) {
        // Abort on any end group tag.
        return;
      }
      switch(tag) {
          default:
            _unknownFields = pb::UnknownFieldSet.MergeFieldFrom(_unknownFields, ref input);
            break;
          case 10: {
            global::Google.Protobuf.WellKnownTypes.Empty subBuilder = new global::Google.Protobuf.WellKnownTypes.Empty();
            if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.GameStarted) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(GameStarted);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            GameStarted = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
          case 18: {
            global::SuperAnkars.Connections.GameResult subBuilder = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.GameResult();
            if (eventCase_ == EventOneofCase.GameEnded) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(GameEnded);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            GameEnded = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #endif

    }

    #if !GOOGLE_PROTOBUF_REFSTRUCT_COMPATIBILITY_MODE
    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
    void pb::IBufferMessage.InternalMergeFrom(ref pb::ParseContext input) {
      uint tag;
      while ((tag = input.ReadTag()) != 0) {
      if ((tag & 7) == 4) {
        // Abort on any end group tag.
        return;
      }
      switch(tag) {
          default:
            _unknownFields = pb::UnknownFieldSet.MergeFieldFrom(_unknownFields, ref input);
            break;
          case 10: {
            words_.AddEntriesFrom(ref input, _repeated_words_codec);
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #endif

  }

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
    public void MergeFrom(TimelineMessage other) {
      if (other == null) {
        return;
      }
      if (other.Timestamp != 0) {
        Timestamp = other.Timestamp;
      }
      if (other.Content.Length != 0) {
        Content = other.Content;
      }
      if (other.Awarded != 0) {
        Awarded = other.Awarded;
      }
      if (other.IsDummy != false) {
        IsDummy = other.IsDummy;
      }
      switch (other.OwnerCase) {
        case OwnerOneofCase.Player:
          if (Player == null) {
            Player = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerInfo();
          }
          Player.MergeFrom(other.Player);
          break;
        case OwnerOneofCase.Bot:
          if (Bot == null) {
            Bot = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.BotInfo();
          }
          Bot.MergeFrom(other.Bot);
          break;
      }

      _unknownFields = pb::UnknownFieldSet.MergeFrom(_unknownFields, other._unknownFields);
    }

    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
    public void MergeFrom(pb::CodedInputStream input) {
    #if !GOOGLE_PROTOBUF_REFSTRUCT_COMPATIBILITY_MODE
      input.ReadRawMessage(this);
    #else
      uint tag;
      while ((tag = input.ReadTag()) != 0) {
      if ((tag & 7) == 4) {
        // Abort on any end group tag.
        return;
      }
      switch(tag) {
          default:
            _unknownFields = pb::UnknownFieldSet.MergeFieldFrom(_unknownFields, input);
            break;
          case 10: {
            global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerInfo subBuilder = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.PlayerInfo();
            if (ownerCase_ == OwnerOneofCase.Player) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(Player);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            Player = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
          case 18: {
            global::SuperAnkars.Connections.BotInfo subBuilder = new global::SuperAnkars.Connections.BotInfo();
            if (ownerCase_ == OwnerOneofCase.Bot) {
              subBuilder.MergeFrom(Bot);
            }
            input.ReadMessage(subBuilder);
            Bot = subBuilder;
            break;
          }
          case 24: {
            Timestamp = input.ReadInt32();
            break;
          }
          case 34: {
            Content = input.ReadString();
            break;
          }
          case 40: {
            Awarded = input.ReadInt32();
            break;
          }
          case 48: {
            IsDummy = input.ReadBool();
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    #endif
    }

    #if !GOOGLE_PROTOBUF_REFSTRUCT_COMPATIBILITY_MODE
    [global::System.Diagnostics.DebuggerNonUserCodeAttribute]
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("protoc", null)]
